headline: TTE Q1 Earnings and Sales Beat Estimates on Strong Realized Prices
summary: TotalEnergies beats Q1 earnings and revenue estimates as realized Brent prices rise, boosting segment results even with slightly lower hydrocarbon production.

headline: Warren Buffett Will Never Sell These 4 Favorite ‘Forever’ Dividend Giants
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: almost 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is invested in ... Warren Buffett Will Never Sell These 4 Favorite ‘Forever’ Dividend Giants
